proposedAction.rationale: Cherry-pick or otherwise restore PR #102's cron-side sourceRefs prewrite and PR #116's grounding samples-only confidence rule onto d5961fe3, then rebuild/restart the runtime and verify the next eval:a2a callback includes sourceRefs plus counter_window.
Current main also lacks the #119/#120 evidence-only CI unblock commits and the 7/12-7/17 verdict artifacts, showing the same upstream sync clobber pattern has recurred beyond F167 code.
A post-sync guard should fail when recently merged F167/eval verdict commits disappear from main, before a restarted runtime accepts the clobbered checkout.
